questionHtml: One criticism of the experiment is that it only measured the rate of transpiration indirectly. Explain how the experiment is an indirect measurement of transpiration.
markschemeHtml:
a. transpiration is water evaporating from «the leaves of» a plant ✔ 

b. what is being measured is water uptake to the plant ✔ 

c. assumes no water used for other processes/photosynthesis ✔

This is not about water loss from apparatus

meta.title: One criticism of the experiment is that it only measured the rate of transpiration indirectly. Explain how the experiment is an indirect measurement of transpiration.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.1.9. Transpiration as a consequence of gas exchange in a leaf
